message.content: Adversaries may exploit closed sources to gather detailed information about their targets, which can significantly enhance their reconnaissance efforts. These sources include reputable private databases and subscriptions to technical/threat intelligence feeds, as well as less-reputable dark web marketplaces. The information obtained can facilitate various malicious activities, such as phishing, developing or obtaining capabilities, and gaining initial access through external remote services or valid accounts. For instance, the threat actor EXOTIC LILY has been known to search business databases like RocketReach and CrunchBase for information on targeted individuals. Mitigation strategies include monitoring and restricting access to sensitive information, employing threat intelligence to identify and respond to data breaches, and educating employees about the risks of oversharing personal and professional information online.
